_comment: Demo-only, de-identified intake payloads for the offline 'demo_marvel' record source. Each applicant alias is a Marvel civilian name whose surname matches the pseudonymized opinion caption in src/risk_engine/acquisition/demo_marvel.py, so retrieval finds the record and fires a DISCREDITED_FORENSIC_METHOD flag. Assert nothing about guilt or innocence. Not training/label data.

intakes._alias_of: Commonwealth v. Chmiel (Pa.) — microscopic hair comparison, capital
